creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 245207
Example: /usr/doc/documentation/public/en exists

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/book/#freebsd-installation-process> step 4 directs readers to two directories that do not exist: 

> … ~/documentation/public/articles/ and ~/documentation/public/books/.

For each of the two paths, two aspects are wrong. 

1) This does not exist:

    ~/documentation

2) Where a path does exist, 

    public/

    is followed by a locale-specific subdirectory.
